name: Ink Python Plugin Template
description: Fork this repository and customize it into your own Ink source plugin.

workspaceConfigSchema.label: Source Name
workspaceConfigSchema.description: Shown in Ink as the source label and print title.

workspaceConfigSchema.label: API Token
workspaceConfigSchema.description: Optional secret used when calling your upstream API.

workspaceConfigSchema.label: Template Message
workspaceConfigSchema.description: Starter content so the template works before you replace fetch.py.
workspaceConfigSchema.defaultValue: Replace fetch.py with your real collection logic.
